questions.question_en: What will happen to Ice Boy inside the freezing Refrigerator?
questions.question_zh: 當 Ice Boy 到達冰冷的冰箱時，會發生什麼事呢？
questions.explanation_en: Correct! Low temperatures cause the water molecules to lose heat and freeze solid.
questions.explanation_zh: 答對了！低溫導致水分子失去熱量並凝固成固體冰塊。

questions.question_en: What will happen to Ice Boy on the warm park Slide?
questions.question_zh: 當 Ice Boy 到達溫暖的公園溜滑梯時，會發生什麼事呢？
questions.explanation_en: Correct! The warm surface provides heat energy, causing the ice structure to melt.
questions.explanation_zh: 答對了！溫暖的表面提供熱能，導致冰塊結構融化成水。

questions.question_en: What will happen to Ice Boy under the blazing sun in a Hot Puddle?
questions.question_zh: 當 Ice Boy 到達烈日下的高溫水坑時，會發生什麼事呢？
questions.explanation_en: Correct! Intense heat causes liquid water to rapidly vaporize and turn into steam gas.
questions.explanation_zh: 答對了！強烈的熱量使液態水迅速汽化，轉化為水蒸氣。
